div.style: margin-top: 10px; padding: 15px; background-color: #f0ad4e; color: white; text-align: center; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold;

a.style: display:block; margin-top: 10px; padding: 15px; background-color: #00A09D; color: white; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
